gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用语音留言编织的跨时空浪漫，笑声与泪水交织的惊喜之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartfelt romantic comedy that turns wrong-number voicemails into a surprisingly touching love story across distance and grief.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温暖浪漫、不介意俗套但追求真挚情感的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm romantic comedies like Love Actually who enjoy heartfelt, slightly predictable but genuinely touching stories.
